details.message: Expected top-level directory memory_bank/ not found. MEMORY_BANK.md exists at repo root (may reflect deliberate migration per MEMORYBANK_CLEANUP audit). All other expected directories present: src/, scripts/, reports/, docs/, validation/, .cursor/. Subdirs reports/audit/ and reports/board/ exist.
memory_bank/ directory missing (governance contract check). MEMORY_BANK.md exists at root. .cursor/automations/ present with README + specs. reports/audit/ and reports/board/ present.
Deprecated directory moltbot/ still exists at repo root with active Python files: board.py, orchestrator.py, promotion_discipline.py, memory_evolution.py, sentinel.py, __init__.py, agents/.

Moltbot code/config references found outside reports/audit and docs: moltbot/ directory (6 files + agents/ subdir), scripts/run_openclaw_molt_synthesis.py, scripts/run_molt_workflow.py, scripts/run_molt_intelligence_expansion.py, scripts/sre/run_sre_anomaly_scan.py. Note: scripts/automations/run_governance_integrity_once.py also references moltbot (as part of governance check logic).
